templates.name: Weekly Report Generator
templates.description: Pull task data from an API and generate a structured weekly report
templates.description_zh: 从任务API拉取数据，AI生成结构化周报

templates.name: Meeting Minutes Generator
templates.description: Process meeting transcripts to extract action items and generate formatted minutes
templates.description_zh: 处理会议记录，提取待办事项并生成格式化纪要

templates.name: Competitor Monitor
templates.description: Monitor competitor RSS feeds and generate reports on significant changes
templates.description_zh: 监控竞品RSS源，检测重大变化时生成分析报告

templates.name: News Aggregator
templates.description: Aggregate news from RSS sources and generate AI-powered summaries
templates.description_zh: 从RSS源聚合新闻，AI生成摘要与排版

templates.name: Price Tracker
templates.description: Scrape product pages for price changes and send email notifications
templates.description_zh: 抓取商品页面价格变化，邮件通知提醒

templates.name: Lead Enrichment Pipeline
templates.description: Enrich sales leads from CSV via API, score with AI, and export results
templates.description_zh: 从CSV读取销售线索，API增强数据，AI评分后导出

templates.name: API Data Report
templates.description: Fetch data from an API, aggregate it, export to CSV, and generate a report
templates.description_zh: 拉取API数据，聚合分析，导出CSV并生成报告

templates.name: Invoice Data Extractor
templates.description: Extract structured data from invoice text using AI and export to CSV
templates.description_zh: AI提取发票结构化数据，导出CSV供财务系统使用
